magic-arrow.name: Magic Arrow
magic-arrow.desc: Fires an arcane-imbued arrow that costs no ammunition.

multiple-shot.name: Multiple Shot
multiple-shot.desc: Fires a spread of arrows hitting up to 5 enemies in a cone.

freezing-arrow.name: Freezing Arrow
freezing-arrow.desc: Fires a frozen arrow that explodes in a cone, chilling and sometimes freezing enemies.

lightning-fury.name: Lightning Fury
lightning-fury.desc: Hurls a lightning javelin that splits and chains to all nearby enemies.

plague-javelin.name: Plague Javelin
plague-javelin.desc: Throws a javelin that releases poison clouds, applying 3 stacks of poison and spreading on kill.

strafe.name: Strafe
strafe.desc: A rapid volley of arrows that strikes all enemies in combat.

penetrate.name: Penetrate
penetrate.desc: Increases hit chance by 20% by reducing enemy dodge.

valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
valkyrie.desc: Summons a Valkyrie warrior to fight at your side.

fire-arrow.name: Fire Arrow
fire-arrow.desc: Fires a flaming arrow that burns the target.

cold-arrow.name: Cold Arrow
cold-arrow.desc: Fires an icy arrow that chills the target.

exploding-arrow.name: Exploding Arrow
exploding-arrow.desc: Fires an arrow that explodes on impact, hitting multiple enemies.

ice-arrow.name: Ice Arrow
ice-arrow.desc: Fires an icy arrow that freezes the target.

guided-arrow.name: Guided Arrow
guided-arrow.desc: Fires a seeking arrow that never misses.

immolation-arrow.name: Immolation Arrow
immolation-arrow.desc: Fires an explosive arrow that leaves a pyre, burning enemies over time.

jab.name: Jab
jab.desc: A quick javelin thrust that hits multiple times.

power-strike.name: Power Strike
power-strike.desc: A lightning-charged javelin attack that releases bolts on impact.

poison-javelin.name: Poison Javelin
poison-javelin.desc: Throws a javelin that releases a poison cloud.

impale.name: Impale
impale.desc: A powerful javelin thrust that ignores defense.

lightning-bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning-bolt.desc: Hurls a javelin charged with lightning energy.

charged-strike.name: Charged Strike
charged-strike.desc: A melee attack that releases lightning bolts to nearby enemies.

fend.name: Fend
fend.desc: A defensive flurry that strikes all surrounding enemies.

lightning-strike.name: Lightning Strike
lightning-strike.desc: A javelin attack that chains lightning between enemies.

inner-sight.name: Inner Sight
inner-sight.desc: Reduces enemy defense, making them easier to hit.

slow-missiles.name: Slow Missiles
slow-missiles.desc: Reduces the speed of enemy projectiles.

avoid.name: Avoid
avoid.desc: Increases chance to avoid ranged attacks.

decoy.name: Decoy
decoy.desc: Creates a duplicate to distract enemies.

evade.name: Evade
evade.desc: Increases chance to evade while moving.

pierce.name: Pierce
pierce.desc: Arrows and javelins can pass through targets, hitting multiple enemies.

shock-web.name: Shock Web
shock-web.desc: Lays a web of crackling lightning that paralyzes all enemies in combat.

fire-blast.name: Fire Blast
fire-blast.desc: Throws an explosive fire trap that bursts in a cone, burning enemies.

blade-fury.name: Blade Fury
blade-fury.desc: Hurls a flurry of blades in a cone, striking multiple enemies.

mind-blast.name: Mind Blast
mind-blast.desc: Releases a psychic shockwave that burns mana and stuns all enemies.

dragon-claw.name: Dragon Claw
dragon-claw.desc: A pair of swift claw strikes against a single target with bonus crit chance.

phoenix-strike.name: Phoenix Strike
phoenix-strike.desc: A combo strike that releases fire, cold, and lightning charges on a single target.

claw-mastery.name: Claw Mastery
claw-mastery.desc: Increases damage with claw weapons by 50%.

weapon-block.name: Weapon Block
weapon-block.desc: When dual-wielding, gain 30% physical dodge chance.

fade.name: Fade
fade.desc: At combat start, gain +30% all resistances and +15% physical dodge.

venom.name: Venom
venom.desc: Basic attacks apply 1 stack of poison to the target.

tiger-strike.name: Tiger Strike
tiger-strike.desc: First charge-up strike that adds damage.

cobra-strike.name: Cobra Strike
cobra-strike.desc: Charge-up attack that steals life and mana.

dragon-tail.name: Dragon Tail
dragon-tail.desc: An explosive kick that hits multiple enemies.

dragon-flight.name: Dragon Flight
dragon-flight.desc: Teleports to an enemy and kicks them.

psychic-hammer.name: Psychic Hammer
psychic-hammer.desc: Knocks back enemies with psychic force.

cloak-of-shadows.name: Cloak of Shadows
cloak-of-shadows.desc: Blinds nearby enemies and provides defense.

shadow-warrior.name: Shadow Warrior
shadow-warrior.desc: Summons a shadow copy that uses your skills.

shadow-master.name: Shadow Master
shadow-master.desc: Summons an advanced shadow that uses skills independently.

charged-bolt-sentry.name: Charged Bolt Sentry
charged-bolt-sentry.desc: Deploys a trap that fires charged bolts.

blade-sentinel.name: Blade Sentinel
blade-sentinel.desc: Releases a spinning blade that patrols the area.

lightning-sentry.name: Lightning Sentry
lightning-sentry.desc: Deploys a trap that shoots lightning.

wake-of-inferno.name: Wake of Inferno
wake-of-inferno.desc: Lays traps that release streams of fire.

death-sentry.name: Death Sentry
death-sentry.desc: Deploys a trap that shoots lightning and explodes corpses.

blade-shield.name: Blade Shield
blade-shield.desc: Surrounds you with spinning blades that damage attackers.

bash.name: Bash
bash.desc: A powerful single-target strike with the equipped weapon.

double-swing.name: Double Swing
double-swing.desc: Two cleaving strikes that hit up to 3 enemies.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.desc: Spins through enemies, dealing physical damage to all targets.

leap-attack.name: Leap Attack
leap-attack.desc: Leaps to a new position and lands with crushing force, stunning all nearby enemies.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.desc: An arcane-fueled rage strike that converts physical damage to arcane.

war-cry.name: War Cry
war-cry.desc: A devastating shout that damages and stuns all enemies.

battle-orders.name: Battle Orders
battle-orders.desc: At combat start, increases max HP and mana by 50%.

shout.name: Shout
shout.desc: At combat start, grants self and mercenary +50% defense for 5 turns.

stun.name: Stun
stun.desc: A stunning blow that knocks back the target.

double-throw.name: Double Throw
double-throw.desc: Throws two weapons simultaneously at enemies.

concentrate.name: Concentrate
concentrate.desc: A focused attack with increased damage and defense.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.desc: Dual-wield attack that increases speed with each hit.

sword-mastery.name: Sword Mastery
sword-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with swords.

axe-mastery.name: Axe Mastery
axe-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with axes.

mace-mastery.name: Mace Mastery
mace-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with maces.

pole-arm-mastery.name: Pole Arm Mastery
pole-arm-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with polearms.

throwing-mastery.name: Throwing Mastery
throwing-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with throwing weapons.

spear-mastery.name: Spear Mastery
spear-mastery.desc: Increases damage and attack rating with spears.

howl.name: Howl
howl.desc: Frightens enemies, causing them to flee.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.desc: Taunts enemies, forcing them to attack you.

grim-ward.name: Grim Ward
grim-ward.desc: Creates a totem from a corpse that frightens enemies.

battle-command.name: Battle Command
battle-command.desc: Increases skill levels for you and allies.

firestorm.name: Firestorm
firestorm.desc: Summons a storm of fire that strikes all enemies and applies burn.

arctic-blast.name: Arctic Blast
arctic-blast.desc: Exhales a cone of freezing wind, chilling enemies hit.

tornado.name: Tornado
tornado.desc: Summons a swirling tornado that tears through enemies in a cone.

summon-dire-wolf.name: Summon Dire Wolf
summon-dire-wolf.desc: Summons a fierce dire wolf companion to fight at your side (max 3).

werewolf-maul.name: Werewolf: Maul
werewolf-maul.desc: Transforms into a werewolf and rends a single enemy, causing them to bleed.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.desc: Summons a hurricane that batters all enemies with cold winds.

elemental-mastery.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental-mastery.desc: Increases fire and cold damage by 30%.

lycanthropy.name: Lycanthropy
lycanthropy.desc: Increases max HP by 50% while in werewolf form.

heart-of-wolverine.name: Heart of Wolverine
heart-of-wolverine.desc: Aura: increases attack speed of self and allies by 30%.

oak-sage.name: Oak Sage
oak-sage.desc: Aura: increases max HP of self and allies by 50%.

molten-boulder.name: Molten Boulder
molten-boulder.desc: Rolls a boulder of lava that burns enemies in its path.

fissure.name: Fissure

cyclone-armor.name: Cyclone Armor
cyclone-armor.desc: Surrounds the druid with a protective cyclone.

twister.name: Twister
twister.desc: Summons small tornadoes that knock back enemies.

volcano.name: Volcano
volcano.desc: Creates a volcano that spews fire.

armageddon.name: Armageddon
armageddon.desc: Calls down meteors from the sky.

werewolf.name: Werewolf
werewolf.desc: Transforms into a werewolf, gaining attack speed and damage.

werebear.name: Werebear
werebear.desc: Transforms into a bear, gaining life and defense.

feral-rage.name: Feral Rage
feral-rage.desc: A savage attack that increases life and speed with each hit.

maul.name: Maul
maul.desc: A powerful bear attack that stuns the target.

rabies.name: Rabies
rabies.desc: Bites an enemy, spreading disease that chains to others.

fire-claws.name: Fire Claws
fire-claws.desc: Ignites claws with fire, adding fire damage to attacks.

hunger.name: Hunger
hunger.desc: An attack that steals life from enemies.

shock-wave.name: Shock Wave
shock-wave.desc: Slams the ground, stunning all nearby enemies.

fury.name: Fury
fury.desc: A rapid series of werewolf attacks.

raven.name: Raven
raven.desc: Summons ravens to blind and attack enemies.

poison-creeper.name: Poison Creeper
poison-creeper.desc: Summons a vine that poisons enemies.

summon-spirit-wolf.name: Summon Spirit Wolf
summon-spirit-wolf.desc: Summons spirit wolves to fight for you.

carrion-vine.name: Carrion Vine
carrion-vine.desc: Summons a vine that consumes corpses to restore life.

solar-creeper.name: Solar Creeper
solar-creeper.desc: Summons a vine that consumes corpses to restore mana.

spirit-of-barbs.name: Spirit of Barbs
spirit-of-barbs.desc: Summons a spirit that reflects damage.

raise-skeleton.name: Raise Skeleton

corpse-explosion.name: Corpse Explosion

poison-nova.name: Poison Nova
poison-nova.desc: Releases a nova of toxic energy, applying 2 stacks of poison to all enemies.

bone-spear.name: Bone Spear
bone-spear.desc: Hurls a piercing bone spear that ignores armor and deals arcane damage.

amplify-damage.name: Amplify Damage
amplify-damage.desc: Curses all enemies, reducing their physical resistance by 50% for several turns.

decrepify.name: Decrepify
decrepify.desc: Curses all enemies, reducing their attack speed by 50% and damage by 33%.

summon-mastery.name: Summon Mastery
summon-mastery.desc: Increases minion HP and damage by 50%.

poison-mastery.name: Poison and Bone Mastery
poison-mastery.desc: Increases poison and arcane damage by 30%.

blood-golem.name: Blood Golem
blood-golem.desc: Always-on aura: 10% of damage dealt is returned as life.

bone-armor.name: Bone Armor
bone-armor.desc: At combat start, gain a 100-point absorb shield that blocks incoming damage.

teeth.name: Teeth
teeth.desc: Fires a volley of bone shards at enemies.

poison-dagger.name: Poison Dagger
poison-dagger.desc: A melee attack that applies deadly poison.

bone-wall.name: Bone Wall
bone-wall.desc: Creates a barrier of bone to shield from attacks.

poison-explosion.name: Poison Explosion
poison-explosion.desc: Detonates a corpse, releasing toxic fumes.

bone-prison.name: Bone Prison
bone-prison.desc: Traps an enemy in a cage of bone.

bone-spirit.name: Bone Spirit
bone-spirit.desc: Summons a seeking spirit of bone that tracks down enemies.

skeleton-mastery.name: Skeleton Mastery

clay-golem.name: Clay Golem

golem-mastery.name: Golem Mastery

raise-skeletal-mage.name: Raise Skeletal Mage

summon-resist.name: Summon Resist

fire-golem.name: Fire Golem
fire-golem.desc: Summons a flaming golem that burns enemies.

revive.name: Revive

dim-vision.name: Dim Vision

terror.name: Terror

confuse.name: Confuse
confuse.desc: Causes enemies to attack each other.

life-tap.name: Life Tap

attract.name: Attract

zeal.name: Zeal
zeal.desc: A flurry of melee strikes that hits up to 3 nearby enemies.

holy-bolt.name: Holy Bolt

blessed-hammer.name: Blessed Hammer
blessed-hammer.desc: Summons spinning hammers of blessed energy that ignore magic resist.

vengeance.name: Vengeance
vengeance.desc: A righteous strike that deals fire, cold, and lightning damage simultaneously.

charge.name: Charge
charge.desc: Charges a target, dealing heavy physical damage and stunning for 1 turn.

fist-of-heavens.name: Fist of the Heavens
fist-of-heavens.desc: Calls down lightning from the heavens, paralyzing all enemies.

might.name: Might
might.desc: Aura: increases physical damage of self and mercenary by 50%.

holy-fire.name: Holy Fire

conviction.name: Conviction

meditation.name: Meditation

sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.desc: Powerful melee attack that damages the caster.

smite.name: Smite
smite.desc: Shield bash that stuns the target.

conversion.name: Conversion

holy-shield.name: Holy Shield

blessed-aim.name: Blessed Aim
blessed-aim.desc: Aura: increases attack rating for you and allies.

concentration.name: Concentration

holy-shock.name: Holy Shock

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary

fanaticism.name: Fanaticism

prayer.name: Prayer
prayer.desc: Aura: slowly heals you and nearby allies.

resist-fire.name: Resist Fire

vigor.name: Vigor

redemption.name: Redemption

thorns.name: Thorns
thorns.desc: Aura: reflects damage back to attackers.

ice-bolt.name: Ice Bolt

frost-nova.name: Frost Nova

frozen-orb.name: Frozen Orb

fire-ball.name: Fire Ball

meteor.name: Meteor

frozen-armor.name: Frozen Armor
frozen-armor.desc: Surrounds the caster with a freezing shield that chills attackers.

ice-blast.name: Ice Blast
ice-blast.desc: Releases a shard of ice that damages and chills the target.

shiver-armor.name: Shiver Armor

charged-bolt.name: Charged Bolt

nova.name: Nova

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.desc: A powerful bolt of lightning that strikes the target.

teleport.name: Teleport

thunder-storm.name: Thunder Storm
thunder-storm.desc: Calls down lightning bolts on enemies periodically.

fire-bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire-bolt.desc: Hurls a small bolt of fire at the target.

inferno.name: Inferno

hydra.name: Hydra

poison-spit.name: Poison Spit

lightning-bolt.name: Lightning Bolt

frost-aura.name: Frost Aura

monster-charge.name: Charge
monster-charge.desc: A boss ability: charges a target for heavy physical damage.

heal.name: Heal

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.desc: Teleports to a new position, gaining +50% dodge for 1 turn.

ice-shard.name: Ice Shard

inferno.name: Inferno

thunder-storm.name: Thunder Storm
thunder-storm.desc: Calls down lightning bolts on all enemies.

poison-cloud.name: Poison Cloud
poison-cloud.desc: Releases a cloud of toxic gas that poisons all enemies.

arcane-bolt.name: Arcane Bolt
arcane-bolt.desc: Fires a bolt of arcane energy at a single target.

rend.name: Rend

frozen-orb.name: Frozen Orb
frozen-orb.desc: Hurls a frozen orb that hits all enemies.

leap.name: Leap
leap.desc: Leaps and crashes down on all enemies, stunning briefly.

enrage.name: Enrage
enrage.desc: Boss enrages, gaining +50% damage for 5 turns.

thorns-aura.name: Thorns Aura
thorns-aura.desc: Reflects a portion of melee damage taken back to attackers.

charge.name: Charge
charge.desc: A boss ability: charges a target for heavy physical damage.

fire-bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire-bolt.desc: Hurls a small bolt of fire at one target.

frost-bolt.name: Frost Bolt
frost-bolt.desc: Hurls a bolt of cold that chills its target.

fire-arrow.name: Fire Arrow

poison-dagger.name: Poison Dagger
poison-dagger.desc: A vicious dagger thrust laced with toxin.

fire-ball.name: Fire Ball

frost-nova.name: Frost Nova

lightning.name: Lightning

corpse-explosion.name: Corpse Explosion

shout.name: Shout

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind

jab.name: Jab

bash.name: Bash

smite.name: Smite

chop.name: Chop

inner-sight.name: Inner Sight

fire-ball.name: Fire Ball

glacial-spike.desc: Hurls a frozen spike that freezes its target.

war-cry.name: War Cry

prayer.name: Prayer Aura

blessed-aim.name: Blessed Aim Aura
